task: The Windows branch of get_app_dir in utils.py takes four lines for one lookup. Simplify it to a direct environment lookup.
correctness_argument: `os.environ.get(key) or os.path.expanduser('~')` collapses the four-line if/None/fallback pattern into one expression while keeping the home-directory fallback. APPDATA/LOCALAPPDATA missing in headless or CI environments falls through to `~` instead of raising KeyError.
